findings.evidence: `rg -n "@\[expose\].*twoRank|theorem twoRank_def" code/TauCeti/Algebra/Group/ElementaryTwoQuotient.lean` shows `@[expose] noncomputable def twoRank` at line 295 and `@[simp] theorem twoRank_def` at line 299.
findings.fix: Remove `@[expose]` from `twoRank`; use `twoRank_def` in proofs that need the finrank characterization.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.twoRank` is marked `@[expose]`, making the body part of the public reduction surface even though `twoRank_def` now provides the needed characteristic API.

findings.evidence: `rg -n "@\[expose\].*twoRank|theorem twoRank_def" code/TauCeti/NumberTheory/ClassGroup/ElementaryTwoQuotient.lean` shows `@[expose] noncomputable def twoRank` at line 159 and `@[simp] theorem twoRank_def` at line 164.
findings.fix: Remove `@[expose]` from the class-group wrapper and rely on `twoRank_def` as the public characterization.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.ClassGroup.twoRank` is also marked `@[expose]`, exposing a wrapper body where the new `twoRank_def` lemma already gives downstream users the intended rewrite.

summary: The defining lemmas added in this revision cover the characteristic API, but the PR still exposes the bodies of both public `twoRank` definitions unnecessarily.
